nasb.text: Moses also gave an inheritance to the half-tribe of Manasseh; and it was for the half-tribe of the sons of Manasseh according to their families.

esv.text: And Moses gave an inheritance to the half-tribe of Manasseh. It was allotted to the half-tribe of the people of Manasseh according to their clans.

cnv.text: 摩西把產業分給瑪拿西半個支派，是按著瑪拿西半個支派的家族分給他們的。

ccb.text: 以下是摩西按宗族分给玛拿西半个支派的土地：
